summary: Iteration 82 - Complete testing of UI/UX improvements and bug fixes. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: navigation restructured (Net Worth first, Hybrids with NEW badge), Market data shows correct percentages (-1.36% not -136%), Family Wealth Dashboard has 'By Structure' tab with all structure filters, Knowledge Graph defaults to 'insights' tab, GoalCard uses proper text-foreground classes.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ macro_data.py: Correct percentage values (SPX -1.36% confirmed in API), batch yfinance downloads with asyncio.gather, cache TTL=300s
✅ MacroDashboard.jsx: No longer multiplies change_pct by 100 - percentages display correctly
✅ Dashboard.jsx: Savings rate uses text-xl (line 504) instead of text-3xl
✅ ScenarioModelling.jsx: GoalCard uses text-foreground and text-muted-foreground classes (lines 235-248)
✅ Layout.jsx: Navigation restructured with Net Worth first under Dashboard, Hybrids under Trading with NEW badge, client context banner implemented
✅ FamilyWealthDashboard.jsx: 'By Structure' tab with filters (All, Personal, Joint, Company, Trust, SMSF) working
✅ HybridsTrading.jsx: New page displays hybrid securities with trading details, benchmark rates
✅ KnowledgeGraphDashboard.jsx: Defaults to 'insights' tab (confirmed via data-state='active')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 verified all UI/UX improvements: 1) Market percentages are correct (API returns -1.36% for SPX, no frontend multiplication), 2) Navigation shows Net Worth first under Dashboard and Hybrids with NEW badge under Trading, 3) Family Wealth Dashboard has 'By Structure' tab with Personal/Joint/Company/Trust/SMSF filters, 4) Knowledge Graph defaults to 'insights' tab, 5) Savings rate uses text-xl, 6) GoalCard uses text-foreground classes. Client context banner is implemented for adviser mode (appears when selectedClient is set).

backend_api_percentage_fix.verification: SPX change_pct: -1.36% (not -136%), confirmed via API and frontend display

market_data_response_time.verification: Cached response under 1s, first call ~4s (acceptable with parallel fetching)

navigation_net_worth_first.verification: Net Worth is first item under Dashboard section in sidebar

navigation_hybrids_new_badge.verification: Hybrids shows under Trading with NEW badge

hybrids_trading_page.verification: Page loads with Market Value, Average Yield, Holdings, hybrid securities list with Details/Trade buttons

family_wealth_by_structure_tab.verification: Tab visible and functional with structure cards (Personal, Joint, Company, Trust, SMSF)

structure_filtering.verification: All filters visible: All Structures, Personal, Joint, Company, Family Trust, SMSF

knowledge_graph_default_insights_tab.verification: Tab state confirms 'insights' is active, 'graph' is inactive on page load

savings_rate_text_size.verification: Dashboard.jsx line 504: text-xl class used for savings rate

goal_card_text_colors.verification: ScenarioModelling.jsx GoalCard uses text-foreground and text-muted-foreground (lines 235-248)

client_context_banner.verification: Implemented in Layout.jsx with data-testid='client-context-banner', shows when adviser mode with selectedClient

mocked_apis.hybrids_trading: Uses demo data for hybrid securities portfolio
mocked_apis.knowledge_graph: MOCKED - EmbeddedGraph class uses in-memory data
mocked_apis.fathom_integration: Mock mode when no API key set
